guide: "Given that 9 times 4 is 36,  what turn-around fact do you know?"
prompt: "If 9 × 4 = 36, what turn-around fact do you know?"
student_action: Equation Builder Mode 2, Click-Place (D). Tiles: 3, 4, 6, 9, 13, 36, 49, 63. Student builds: `4 × 9 = 36`.
guide_on_correct: "4 × 9 = 36. You can multiply in any order and get the same product."
